intent: Launch the hwLedger Planner GUI, adjust the sequence-length slider from 4096 to 6000 tokens, and verify the memory breakdown + attention pattern labels update live.

keyframes.caption: App launch splash; 'hw' badge appears, launching Planner as default tab.
Planner screen at default configuration - sequence length slider shows 4096 tokens, memory breakdown pane blank.
Cursor grabs the seq-len slider thumb; hint 'drag to 6000' surfaces above the track.
Slider snapped to 6000 tokens; the value label flips to the accent colour while the breakdown recalculates.
Stacked bar animates in - Weights 22.4 GB, KV Cache 14.7 GB, Activations 9.1 GB, Scratch 4.2 GB.
Attention pattern label highlights: 'Flash v2 GQA' is pinned bottom-right, confirming the inferred attention kind.

steps.description: The hwLedger app window opens and the Planner tab is auto-selected. A brief 'hw' launch badge fades as the planner surface renders.
steps.intent: App launches and shows Planner screen

steps.description: Sidebar shows Planner highlighted; the sequence-length slider defaults to 4096 tokens and the memory breakdown pane is empty awaiting configuration.
steps.intent: Planner screen at launch with default config

steps.description: Cursor grabs the slider thumb around x=700 and drags toward x=940. A tooltip appears above the track reading 'drag to 6000'.
steps.intent: User drags seq-len slider from 4096 to 6000 tokens

steps.description: Slider thumb now sits at the 6000-token mark. The value label flips to the accent colour and the breakdown pane enters its recalculating state.
steps.intent: Planner after adjusting seq-len slider to 6000 tokens

steps.description: Four horizontal segments animate in: red Weights (22.4 GB), amber KV Cache (14.7 GB), blue Activations (9.1 GB), green Scratch (4.2 GB).
steps.intent: Memory breakdown stacked bar is rendered

steps.description: A callout in the lower-right of the breakdown pane confirms the inferred attention kind: 'Flash v2 GQA'.
steps.intent: Attention kind label shows the attention pattern type

title: SwiftUI planner launch

verification.note: Placeholder keyframes + slideshow render - real TCC-gated capture pending on user Mac.
